title: 10 best herbal tinctures for headaches
description: St john's wort tinctures helps with headaches because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling and tension in the blood vessels. This can provide relief from tension headaches, migraines, and other types of headache pain. Additionally, St John's Wort has been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system, helping to relax the muscles and ease stress-related headaches.
